name: Magus from the East
oracleText:
When Magus from the East enters the battlefield, scry 2.
Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, scry 1.
flavorText: "We have seen his star in the east." — Matthew 2:2
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Gentile da Fabriano's "Adoration of the Magi" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of the 1423 Uffizi work.
classics.creditText: Gentile da Fabriano, Adoration of the Magi
classics.sourceNotes: This gives the magi card a richly iconographic old-master centerpiece.
